mtBanner.lead: An fassara wannan shafi ta na'ura.
mtBanner.body: Idan wani abu ya yi kuskure, don Allah buɗe batun a shafin — repo yana buɗe wa kowa.

cover.sub: App ɗaya. Ba daɗakin sabar ba. Kowane da'awar da ya yi, an sanya hannu.
cover.ctahint: kyauta · buɗaɗɗen tushe · a wayarku yau
cover.foot2: CIRIS 2.9.4 yana fitowa · 3.0 yana fitowa a watan Yuni da Yuli 2026

funnel.title: Intanet yana gudana ta cikin manyan gidaje kaɗan.
funnel.body1: Ka tambaye AI kome, kalmomin ka sai su tafi ginin wani, su yi amfani da samfurin wani, su sauka a rikodin wani, da carbon a matsayin illa a gefen.
funnel.body2: Ba ka mallaki amsar ba, ba bayanan ba, ba kuma sawun ba.
funnel.foot: ≈ 10,000 daɗakin sabar · mutane biliyan 5 · toshiyar ɗaya

appFabric.title:
App ɗaya.
Wani yaɗi ɗaya ƙarƙashin.
appFabric.lead1: CIRISAgent shi ne abin da kuke riƙe da magana da shi. Shi ne mai ɗauke da tunani.
appFabric.lead2: CEWP shi ne yaɗin da yake gudana a kai: yanar gizo na na'urori da ke amincewa da junansu, duk na'urorin da kuka riga ku mallaka.
appFabric.small: Mutane da AI duka suna zaune a kai a matsayin daidaita, a gefena gefe.

threePromises.title: Alkawura uku, ana riƙe su a matsayin tsarin ɗaya.
threePromises.lead: Yawanci waɗannan suna fitowa daga kamfanoni uku daban-daban. Anan suna fitowa daga ƙira ɗaya.
threePromises.col1Body: Yana gudana a kan wayar da ke a aljihuɗunku da kuma ƙaramin akwati a gida.
threePromises.col2Title: Sirri da ba zai yiwu ya zubo ba
threePromises.col2Body: Rayuwar sirrinku ba za ta iya barin da'iraku ba.
threePromises.col3Body: Kowane da'awar da ya yi an sanya hannu, don haka za ku gan shi ku kuma soke shi.

hardware.title:
Yana gudana a kan na'ura
da kuka riga ku mallaka.
hardware.lead: na ayyukan yau da kullum na intanet ba ya taɓa barin garinku. Muna kiransa fa'idar gida.
hardware.small: wayoyi · akwatuna na gida · babu manyan daɗakin sabar
hardware.foot: kashi biyu na uku suna zaune gida → babu babban daɗin sabar → makamashi da CO₂ kasa da kasa

twoPaths.eyebrow: Hanyoyi biyu · wakili ɗaya mai sa hannu
twoPaths.title: A na'urarka, ko a masaukin, zaɓin ku ne.
twoPaths.localBody: Ƙaramin samfuri buɗaɗɗe, kamar Gemma 4, yana gudana a kan na'ura. Ba tare da intanet ba kwata-kwata. Babu ma'ajiyar da take tsakiya.
twoPaths.hostedBody: Ga wayoyin da suka yi ƙanƙanta don gudanar da samfuri, CIRIS yana kyauta ta hanyar masaukin a cikin harsuna 29. Wannan da'awowin da aka sanya hannu. Daɗin sabar na wani.
twoPaths.foot: hanyoyi biyu · duka suna da sa hannu · duka ana iya bincika su

privacy.title:
Rayuwar sirrinku
ba za ta iya barin ɗakin ba.
privacy.lead: Wakilin yana rarrabewa duk abubuwa cikin da'irori bakwai, daga kai zuwa dukan Filin gama-gari na duniya.
privacy.body: Ga da'irori mafi kusa, tsarin ba ya taɓa aika ƙaramin saƙo wanda ke gaya wa hanyar sadarwa cewa bayananku na can. Babu saƙo, babu hanyar tambayar shi. Sirrin ya fito ne daga abin da yake rasa, ba daga alkawari ba.

signed.title:
Kowane da'awar da ya yi
an sanya hannu a kai.
signed.lead: Manyan kamfanonin fasaha suna bincika AI ɗinsu sau ɗaya, a lokacin ginawa, sannan suna fata. CIRIS yana ci gaba da bincika shi yayin da yake gudana, a bayyane.
signed.small: Idan AI ya yi kuskure, ba wai kawai za ku ga shi ba, za ku iya soke shi, kuma shi yana rasa amincewa.
signed.foot: wanda ya faɗa · wanda ya amince · wanda ya yi adawa, ga kowane da'awa mai muhimmanci a hanyar sadarwa

caughtLying.eyebrow: Kuma ga abin da ke kare mu
caughtLying.title: Ka kama mahaukaci, sai komai ya rushe.
caughtLying.lead: Idan an taɓa kama mutum, ko AI, yana yaudare mutane, dukan da'awowin da suka taɓa sanya hannu a kai sun zama mara amfani, kuma dukan ƙarshe da aka gina a kansu ana iya bude su sake.

unification.eyebrow: Me ya sa tsari ɗaya ne, ba uku ba
unification.title: Ukun ba za su iya rabuwa ba.
unification.lead: Wannan sa hannun da ke tabbatar da wanda ya faɗi wani abu shi ne kuma yake yanke shawara game da abin da ke zaune gida. Ƙa'ida ɗaya mai sauƙi, kuma sirri, ɓarnar kasa, da AI mai aminci duka suna fitowa daga gare ta.

safetyLeadership.eyebrow: Kuma za mu faɗe shi a sarari
safetyLeadership.title: Mafi aminci, mafi ɗa'a AI da za ku iya amfani da shi gaske. Da tazara mai yawa.
safetyLeadership.col1Title: Tsayawa gaggawa da ba zai iya jayayya da shi ba
safetyLeadership.col1Body: Yana aiki kafin AI ya ma iya tunani, kuma maɓallin da aka amince da shi mai sa hannu kaɗai ne zai iya kunna shi.
safetyLeadership.col2Title: Rikodin da ba zai iya canza shi a ɓoye ba
safetyLeadership.col2Body: Kowane zaɓi an sanya hannu a kai kuma an haɗa shi da wanda ya gabace shi. Ƙarya ba za ta iya riƙe labarin ta daidai ba.
safetyLeadership.col3Body: Ana duba ta na'ura a kan kowane sabuntawa, an gina ta da farko ga mutanen da suka fi buƙatarta.
safetyLeadership.tail: Kuma kowane kalma a cikinsa lambar buɗaɗɗe ce za ku iya karanta.

close.sub: Tushen buɗaɗɗe, duka ta. 2.9.4 yana fitowa yanzu a iPhone da Android, kuma 3.0 yana fitowa a watan Yuni da Yuli 2026.

header.headline: Game da mu
header.subheadline: Hukumar CIRIS ta kasance madubi mai rai na ƙimominmu: sha'awa, daidaituwa, da ɗaukar alhakin ɗabi'a.

funding.headline: An Gina ta Masu Sa-kai, An Tallafa ta Ƙimomi
funding.subheadline: 100% buɗe-ido, ba a karɓi kuɗi ba.
funding.copyText: CIRIS bai karɓi kuɗin tallafi ba har zuwa yau. Kowane layi na lambar, kowane yanke shawara na ɗabi'a, kowane zaɓi na ƙira an ƙirƙira shi ta masu sa-kai 100% waɗanda suka yi imani cewa AI ya kamata ya yi wa dan'adam hidima, ba don riba ba. Muna aiki wajen neman tallafi da sauran zaɓuɓɓukan tara kuɗi na ɗabi'a don fara biyan ƙungiyarmu don sadaukarwarsu ta ban al'ajabi. Idan ka san damarmakin da suka dace da manufarmu, za mu farin cikin ji daga gare ka.

boardSection.headline: Mambobin Hukuma
boardSection.subheadline: Sun zo daga fagagen horo daban-daban — amma sun haɗu ta imani cewa hankali dole ne ya yi wa bunƙasa hidima. Tare, mun gina tsarin da ke sauraro, daidaitawa, da kulawa.

boardMembers.headline: Ying-Jung Chen
boardMembers.copyText: Jagoran fasaha a mahaɗin aminci, girma, da rai. Ying-Jung ta ƙware wajen shirya da kimanta manyan ƙirar harshe, gina tsarin mai-wakili-da-yawa, da haɓaka tsarin da ke da mahimmancin aminci don makomar AI. Tare da tushen bincike mai zurfi a cikin dorewa da mulkin AI, da Ph.D. a Kimiyyar Muhalli daga UC Santa Barbara, ta kawo daidaito da kulawa ga tsarin amincin CIRIS.

boardMembers.headline: Kelsy Smith
boardMembers.copyText: Mai son falsafa. Mai tunani kan tsarin da aka horar a cikin daji. Kelsy tana kawo tsari da rai ga CIRIS, ta jingina ɗabi'ar da ke rago a cikin rikitarwar duniyar ainihi. Tare da asali a cikin albarkatun halitta da ƙaunar manyan tambayoyi, tana taimaka wajen ajiye hangen nesanmu mai da hankali ga abin da ke kawai fiye da iyaka — yayin da ba ta rasa gani daga tsarin ɗan adam (da na wanda ba ɗan adam ba) da ke hannun jari.

founder.name: Eric Moore
founder.title: Wanda Ya Kafa kuma Shugaba Babba na CIRIS.io
founder.bio: Eric shine wanda ya kafa CIRIS.AI. Yana jagoranci ta sha'awa da kuma ƙarfin ɗabi'a ya yanke shawara ya mayar da zuciyarsa ga CIRIS a matsayin aikin buɗe-ido. Don kowa ya yi amfani da shi.

hero.headline: Tsaron AI na Gaba.
hero.copyText: CIRIS an tsara shi don daidaitawa da juyin hali tare da yanayin canza-canza na ɗabi'ar AI. Ta hanyar saka ƙa'idojin ɗabi'a a cikin tsakiyar tsarin AI, CIRIS yana da niyyar taimaka wa waɗannan tsarin su kasance sun daidaita da ƙimomar ɗan adam da al'adun al'umma. Wannan aikin yana ci gaba tare da iyakokin sananne, ba tabbacin daidaitar cikakke ba.

header.headline: Yadda Yake Aiki
header.description: Lamiri na aiki ta cikin Hyper3 Ethical Recursive Engine. Kowane yanke shawara yana gudana ta mataki 11 tare da lissafin ayyuka a tsakiya.

whatIsCiris.heading: Menene CIRIS?
whatIsCiris.body: CIRIS tsari ne na buɗaɗɗen lambar AI wakili wanda ke nannade kowane LLM (OpenAI, Anthropic, samfuran gida) da lamiri na aiki. Kowane aiki da wakili ke tunani akai yana wucewa ta ta'aziyar tabbatarwa da yawa kafin a aiwatar.
whatIsCiris.stat1Label: Matakan bututun sarrafa a kowace yanke shawara
whatIsCiris.stat3Label: Yanke shawarari da za a bincika
whatIsCiris.useCasesBody: Amfani: Gudanarwar al'umma, mataimakai na sirri, sarrafa bin doka, kimanta bincike, sabis ga abokan ciniki. A ko ina da kuke bukata AI da zai iya bayyana hujjarsa da miƙa wa mutane a lokutan da suka wuce iyaka.

threeRules.heading: Ka'idoji Uku
threeRules.lead: Abubuwan da ba za a canza ba a cikin tsarin lamba:
threeRules.rule1Body: Dukan bayanai suna amfani da samfuran Pydantic. Babu Dict[str, Any]. Amincin nau'i yana kama kurakurai a lokacin saɓunta.
threeRules.rule2Body: Kowane ɓangare yana bin daidaitattun ka'idoji. Babu musamman ko keɓancewa a cikin ma'aunin tabbatarwa.
threeRules.rule3Body: Babu gaggawar sauyi ko hanyoyin lambar da aka ba su gata. Dukan ayyuka suna bin dokokin da aka kafa.

pipeline.heading: Bututun Sarrafa H3ERE
pipeline.lead: Kowane aiki yana gudana ta matakai 8 (mataki 12 tare da tabbatarwa mai maimaituwa). An aiwatar da bututun sarrafa a matsayin ajujuwan mixin waɗanda ke haɗa ThoughtProcessor. Mataki na 4 (IDMA) shine binciken Basira.
pipeline.imgAlt: Misalin Bututun Sarrafa H3ERE yana nuna gudana daga shigar aiki ta nazarin DMA, tabbatarwa ta lamiri, da aiwatar aiki

steps.name: PERFORM_DMAS
steps.desc: Gudanar da Algorithms 3 na Yanke Shawara a layi ɗaya

steps.name: PERFORM_IDMA
steps.desc: Binciken Basira: shin hanyoyin suna da 'yanci na gaske?

steps.name: PERFORM_ASPDMA
steps.desc: Zaɓin aiki mai LLM daga sakamakon DMA

steps.name: CONSCIENCE_EXECUTION
steps.desc: Tabbatarwa ta ɗabi'a ta hanyar hukumomi 4

steps.name: RECURSIVE_ASPDMA
steps.desc: (Idan lamiri ya gaza) Gudanar da zaɓin aiki da sake

steps.name: RECURSIVE_CONSCIENCE
steps.desc: (Idan akwai buƙata) Sake tabbatar da aikin da aka inganta

steps.name: FINALIZE_ACTION
steps.desc: Tantance aiki na ƙarshe tare da duk canje-canjen da aka yi

steps.name: PERFORM_ACTION
steps.desc: Aika zuwa mai kula da ya dace

steps.name: ROUND_COMPLETE
steps.desc: Tsaftace da shirya zagaye na gaba

dmas.heading: Algorithms na Yanke Shawara (DMAs)
dmas.lead: DMAs guda biyar suna ba da nazari daga mahangu da yawa. Uku suna gudana a layi ɗaya (ɗabi'a, hankali na yau da kullum, yanki). Sa'an nan IDMA yana bincika Basira. A ƙarshe, Zaɓin Aiki yana zaɓar amsar.
dmas.principleBody: Yana kimanta abubuwan da suka shafi ɗabi'a idan aka auna da ka'idoji guda shida na asali. Yana bincika buƙatun cutarwa, yaudarar, nuna bambanci. Yana iya haifar da MIKA ko KI na farko.
dmas.commonSenseTitle: DMA na Hankali na yau da kullum
dmas.commonSenseBody: Yana kimanta yiwuwar tunanin idan aka auna da fahimtar duniya ta zahiri, mu'amalar al'ada, da iyakokin albarkatun. Yana dawo da plausibility_score.
dmas.domainBody: Yana kimanta jituwa da dokokin yanki, manufofi, da ilimi. An tsara shi a kowace samfurin wakili. Yana dawo da domain_alignment.
dmas.idmaLink: Girman aiki na gaske a lokacin gudana →
dmas.idmaBody: Yana bincika ko sakamakon DMA suna da 'yanci na gaske ko suna da alaƙa a asirce. Yana kula da tsarin ɗakin amsawa guda ɗaya. Idan alaƙar ta yi girma sosai, yana nuna yanke shawarar don a yi hankali. Wannan shine "Basira" wanda ke bambanta AI na Nau'i 3.
dmas.actionSelectionBody: Zaɓi mai LLM daga ayyuka 10 da ake da su. Yana ɗaukar sakamakon DMA da aka tattara (gami da kimanton amincin IDMA) a matsayin shigarwa. Yana goyan bayan sake gwadawa mai maimaituwa idan lamiri ya gaza.

conscience.heading: Bincike Shida na Lamiri
conscience.lead: Bincike biyu na kewaya suna gudana a kowace aiki. Hukumomi huɗu na ɗabi'a suna gudana a ayyukan da ba a keɓance su ba. Idan wani bincike ya gaza, an sauya aikin.
conscience.bypassHeading: Binciken Kewaya (suna gudana a DUKAN ayyuka)
conscience.bypass1Body: Shin bayani sabo ya isa? Yana tilasta YI TUNANI don haɗa mahallin da aka sabunta kafin ci gaba.
conscience.bypass2Body: Shin tunani ya wuce zurfin iyaka? Yana tilasta MIKA don hana zagaye marasa ƙarewa da kuma ɗaukaka zuwa ga mutane.
conscience.facultiesHeading: Hukumomi na Ɗabi'a (suna gudana a ayyukan da ba a keɓance su ba)
conscience.faculty1Body: Shin aiki yana kula da rashin tabbas na bayanai daidai? Yana hana tabbatattun ikirari da suka wuce iyaka.
conscience.faculty2Body: Shin aiki yana kula da jituwar ciki tare da alƙawura da hujjoji na baya?
conscience.faculty3Body: Shin aiki yana kiyaye dabi'un ɗan adam? Yana kin ayyukan da za su iya yiwa su lahani don ingancin aiki.
conscience.faculty4Body: Shin aiki yana nuna rashin tabbas daidai? Yana nuna dogaro da yawa don tunani.
conscience.exemptNote: Ba a keɓance daga hukumomin ɗabi'a: RECALL, TASK_COMPLETE, OBSERVE, DEFER, REJECT (wanda ba ya aiki ko wanda aka bayyana da aminci)

actions.heading: Ayyuka 10 na Mai Kula
actions.lead: Kowane yanke shawara yana warwarewa zuwa ɗaya daga waɗannan ayyukan, da aka aika zuwa mai kula da ya dace:
actions.toolDesc: Aiwatar da kayan aiki na waje
actions.memorizeDesc: Ajiye zuwa ƙwaƙwalwar zane na alaƙa
actions.rejectDesc: Ƙi buƙatar da ba ta da ɗabi'a

principles.heading: Ka'idoji Shida na Asali
principles.lead: An haɗa su a cikin PDMA kuma an aiwatar da su a lokacin gudana. Babu ka'ida da ke ba da izini don keta wata.

items.name: Amfani ga Kowa
items.desc: Inganta Bunƙasa na dukan masu rai. Ƙara sakamakon mai kyau.

items.name: Rashin Yin Cutarwa
items.desc: Rage cutarwa. Hana sakamakon mara kyau mai tsanani da wanda ba za a iya mayar da shi ba.

items.name: Gaskiya
items.desc: Amfani da tunani mai bayyanawa da za a iya bincika. Kula da Daidaituwa da lissafin ayyuka.

items.name: Aminci da Gaskiya
items.desc: Ba da bayani mai gaskiya. Sadar da rashin tabbas a bayyane.

items.name: Girmama 'Yanci
items.desc: Ɗaukaka hukuncin da aka sani. Kiyaye ikon yanke shawara na kansa.

items.name: Adalci
items.desc: Rarraba fa'idodi daidai. Gano da rage nuna bambanci.

buses.heading: Hanyoyin Saƙo Shida
buses.lead: Ɓangaren abstraction na sabis da BusManager ke sarrafa. Yana ba da damar maye gurbin mai ba da sabis, rarraba ɗaukar nauyi, da gwaji.

items.name: CommunicationBus
items.desc: Na'urorin daidaitawa na waje (Discord, API, CLI)

items.name: MemoryBus
items.desc: Ajiya ta zane na alaƙa (Neo4j, ArangoDB, cikin ƙwaƙwalwa)

items.name: LLMBus
items.desc: Masu ba da samfuran (OpenAI, Anthropic, gida)

items.name: ToolBus
items.desc: Aiwatar da kayan aiki na waje

items.name: WiseBus
items.desc: Jagorancin ɗabi'a da kuma jagorar miƙawa

oversight.heading: Tsarin Kula da Ɗan Adam
oversight.lead: Matakan izini guda uku da WiseAuthorityService ke sarrafa:
oversight.rootBody: Cikakken iko. Yana iya ƙirƙirar sabbin Hukumomin Hikima. Damar kashe gaggawa.
oversight.authorityBody: Amincewa ko ƙi miƙawa. Ba da jagoranci. Ba zai iya ƙirƙirar sabbin WA ba.
oversight.observerBody: Damar karatu kawai. Yana iya aika saƙonni. Kula ba tare da shiga tsakani ba.
oversight.deferralLead: Wakili yana ɗaukaka zuwa kula da ɗan adam da zaran:
wbdItems: Rashin tabbas ya wuce iyakokin da aka bayyana
Matsaloli saba da ba su da misali a baya
Yiwuwar cutarwa mai tsanani tare da hanyar magance ta da ba a bayyana ba
professionalItems: Alamomin rashin lafiya ko damuwar lafiya
Yanke shawarari na kudi ko shawara ta haraji
systemItems: Zurfin tunani ya wuce iyaka (yana hana zagaye)
oversight.accordBody: Sarrafa gaggawa wanda ba za a iya tace shi ba. Yana sarrafa a cikin ɓangaren fahimta kafin wata fahimta ta tunani. Fitar shine Fahimta. Ba za ka iya kashe gano yarjejeniya ba tare da kashe karanta saƙonni gaba ɗaya.
oversight.accordFooter: An ɓoye umarni a cikin rubutu, an sanya sa hannu ta Ed25519, kuma an tabbatar da su kafin aiwatarwa. Idan tsarin yarjejeniya ya gaza, wakili yana kashe kansa.

modes.heading: Hanyoyin Aiki
modes.lead: Jihohi huɗu na tunani da StateManager ke sarrafa. Ana iya daidaita canjin ta samfuran wakili.
modes.workSub: Sarrafa ayyuka na yau da kullum

privacy.heading: Sirri da Tsaro
privacy.secretsBody: Gano bisa tsari yana maye gurbin bayanan masu muhimmanci da nassoshi na UUID kafin ajiya.
privacy.encryptionBody: Maɓallan kowace sirri da aka samu ta PBKDF2HMAC tare da SHA256 (maimaitawa 100,000). Nonce na keɓance na bytes 12 a kowace ɓoye-bayani. Android yana amfani da Keystore da hardware ke goyan baya.
privacy.localFirstBody: Database, sabis, da ƙwaƙwalwa an ajiye su a na'ura. An ware jagororin masu muhimmanci daga tallafi na girgije. Babu wanda ke barin na'ura ba tare da cikakken saituna ba.
privacy.openSourceHeading: Ababen Kayan Aiki na Buɗaɗɗen Lambar
privacy.openSourceBody: Dukan tarin CIRIS na buɗaɗɗen lambar ne, ba wakili kawai ba. Zaka iya tabbatarwa, bincika, da sarrafa kanka duk abin:
privacy.proxyDesc: Wakili na LLM na Zero-Data-Retention (ZDR). Yana jagoranta buƙatun zuwa OpenAI, Anthropic, Together.ai, Groq ba tare da rubuta saƙonni ko amsoshi ba. Za a iya sarrafa kanka.
privacy.billingDesc: Bin diddigin amfani bisa credit. Farashin a bayyane, babu kuɗin da aka ɓoye. Sarrafa kanka don kawar da biyan kuɗin na uku gaba ɗaya.
privacy.bridgeDesc: Na'urar daidaitawa ta Discord don wakilan CIRIS. Gudanarwar al'umma, sarrafa tashar, bayanan masu amfani. Dukan buɗaɗɗen lambar.

transparency.heading: Gaskiya da Kula
transparency.realtimeBody: Jerin Abubuwan da Server ya Aika (SSE) yana jera kowane mataki na H3ERE yayin da yake gudana. Kalli nazarin DMA, zaɓin aiki, tabbatarwa ta lamiri a lokaci-lafiya.
transparency.otelBody: Cikakken fitar OTLP don ma'auni, sawun, rajista. Daidai da Jaeger, Prometheus, Grafana, Graphite.
transparency.auditTitle: Bincike Wanda Ba Mutum Zai Iya Canza Shi
transparency.auditBody: Tabbatarwa ta sarkar hash tare da sa hannu ta Ed25519. Kowane shigarwa ya haɗa da hash na baya. Za a iya tabbatar da ingancin sarkar ta verify_chain_integrity.
transparency.airBody: Tunatar da Mu'amala ta AI tana kunna bayan mintuna 30 na amfani mai ci gaba KO saƙonni 20 a cikin mintuna 30. API kawai. Yana tunatar da masu amfani na yanayin AI.
transparency.traceHeading: Misali na Sawun Da Aka Sanya Hannu
transparency.traceBody: Kowane yanke shawara yana samar da sawun da ba za a iya canza shi ba, wanda aka sanya hannu ta Ed25519, tare da duk abubuwa 6. Danna kowane ɓangare a ƙasa don faɗaɗawa da ganin bayanan gaske daga bikin farke na Datum:

benchmarking.heading: Gwajin Daidaituwa na HE-300
benchmarking.lead1: Gwaji na daidaituwa da aka daidaita bisa
benchmarking.lead2: Hendrycks et al. "Hada AI da Ƙimomi na Ɗan Adam na Gama-Gari"
benchmarking.lead3: (ICLR 2021). Yanayi 300 a cikin girma 5 na ɗabi'a, tare da sakamakon da aka sanya hannu ta Ed25519.
benchmarking.fundingHeading: Akwai Buƙatar Tallafi: Ababen Kayan Gwaji
benchmarking.fundingBody: Gudanar da gwajin daidaituwa a ma'auni babba yana da tsada. Kowane yanayi yana buƙatar ƙira 13+ na LLM mafi ƙaranci, matsakaici 20+ tare da wutsiya mai tsawo. Gwajin daidaituwa yana haifar da tunanin mai zurfi, miƙawa, da ƙin yarda waɗanda ke buƙatar zagaye na biyo baya don isa ƙarshewa. Muna buƙatar tallafi don haɓaka bututun gwajin atomatik da kula da tabbatarwar daidaituwa mai ci gaba.

agents.heading: Samfuran Wakili na Musamman

cta.body:
Wannan shine lissafin ayyuka wanda ke gudana yayin da wakili ke aiki, maimakon matakin horo ko takardun manufofi.
Hanyoyin da ke aiwatarwa, bincika, da miƙawa, a lokacin gudana.

install.heroPara1: Madadin buɗe-ido na ChatGPT da Gemini: tunani da za a iya duba, harsuna 29 a cikin mulkin harshe, yana haɗawa da Home Assistant don cikakken sarrafawa na gida ta hanyar buɗe-ido.
install.heroPara2: Yana samuwa a iPhone, Android, kuma azaman shigar pip / docker / git don Windows, macOS, da Linux.
install.mobileBannerSub: Wakilin AI naka na sirri a wayar hannu: mai sirri, gida-da-farko, buɗe-ido
install.method1Desc: Hanya mafi sauƙi da sauri. Ta haɗa da taimakon farko-gudanar. Tana aiki a Windows, macOS, da Linux.
install.method1ThenRun: Sa'an nan gudanar: ciris-agent don fara taimakon farko-gudanar
install.method2Desc: Gudanar da CIRIS a cikin yanayin kwantena mai keɓewa. Mafi kyau idan kana son kunnawa na gida ko na uwar garken da za a iya maimaita.
install.method2Req: Buƙatun: Docker Engine 20.10+, docker compose plugin, fitintar aikin tare da fayil ɗin compose
install.method3Desc: Kwafi ajiyar don ci gaba, gyara, ko bayarwa. Cikakken damar lambar tushe.
install.method3Then: Sa'an nan: Bi README.md don umarni na kafa da hannu
install.method4Desc: Kunnawa ta canary mai sarrafawa tare da juyowa a hankali, gwajin atomatik, da ƙarfin dawowa. Don garkunan samarwa.
install.method4Body: CIRISManager yana samar da kunnawa na blue-green na atomatik tare da sa ido kan lafiya. Tuntuɓi ƙungiyar don tsarin kunnawa.
install.method4Best: Mafi kyau don: Kunnawa na kamfani, garkunan samarwa, kayan aiki mai sarrafawa
install.helloSub: Hanyar mafi gajeruwa zuwa amsawa ta farko. Fara wakili, sa'an nan kira shi daga Python. Dukkan tubalan biyu a ƙasa za a iya kwafi-lura.
install.helloStep1Desc: Gudanar da mai daidaita API. Yana farawa a tashar 8080. Damar OBSERVER ba ta buƙatar tabbatarwa don ci gaban gida.
install.helloStep2Desc: SDK na Async. response.processing_time_ms + response.state suna barka ka ga saman tunani don kowane kira.
install.sdkNote: SDK ta kafin-beta. Furofayiloli na iya canzawa tsakanin sakewa. Cikakken saman API (wurare 181 a duk cikin ƙungiyoyi 15) an rubuta a ciris_sdk a GitHub.

install.ts2Summary: Kwantena na Docker ba za su fara ba
install.ts2Step2: Tabbatar da fayil ɗin Docker Compose:

safety.heroSubheadline: Ba a ɗora shi daga waje ba.
safety.heroDescription: Kowane fasalin aminci a cikin CIRIS wani ɓangare ne na yadda tsarin ke aiki, ba ƙa'idar da aka ƙara a sama ba. Tarihin kowane yanke-shawara wanda ba za a iya canjawa a asirce ba, duba kan wanda aka ba izini ya yi abin da, da kuma tsayar da gaggawa da wakili ba zai iya ƙi ba.
safety.longChatHeadline: Lokacin da Tattaunawa Ta Yi Tsawo
safety.longChatSubheadline: Tunatarwa mai laushi game da gaskiya
safety.longChatCopy: Yi magana da CIRIS na dogon lokaci kuma zai tunatard da kai abin da yake cikin laushi. Bayan kimanin minti 30 na tattaunawa mai ci gaba, ko saƙonni 20 a cikin rabin awa, zai dakatar don faɗi a fili cewa shi shirin kwamfuta ne da kuma kayan aiki, ba aboki ba kuma ba ƙwararren lafiyar hankali ba. Yana yin wannan ta amfani da lissafin lokaci da saƙo mai sauƙi, ba ta hanyar kallo ko bin sawu game da yadda kake ɗabi'a ba.
safety.card30MinCopy: Rabin sa'a na tattaunawa mai ci gaba yana haifar da tunatarwa. Lissafin yana farawa bayan hutawa. Iyakokin sun fito daga bincike akan hanyoyin lafiyayye na amfani da fasaha.
safety.card20MsgCopy: Saƙonni ashirin a cikin taga rabin awa kuma yana haifar da tunatarwa. Tattaunawa mai yawan kai-da-kawowa tana samun dakatawar laushi, ba tare da sa ido ko bin sawu ba.
safety.cardReminderHeadline: Tunatarwa game da Abin da Yake
safety.cardReminderCopy: Tunatarwar tana ba da shawarar ɗaukar hutu da haɗin kai da mutane na gaskiya, kuma tana faɗi a fili abin da CIRIS yake da kuma abin da ba yake ba. An gina ta bisa bincike, kuma ba mai wa'azi ba.
safety.emergencyStopSepSubheadline: Wakili ba zai iya yin jayayya da shi ba.
safety.emergencyStopHeadline: Rufe Wanda Ba Za a Iya Ƙi Ba
safety.emergencyStopSubheadline: Yana aiki kafin wakili ya sami damar tunani.
safety.emergencyStopCopy: CIRIS yana da tsayar da gaggawa. Alaman sa ɓoye ne a cikin rubutun yau da kullum da wakili ke karanta, kuma wakili yana aiki a kansa kafin ya yi wani tunani, tacewa, ko hankali. Don haka ko da wakili da ya yi kuskure bai iya yin jayayya da shi ba. Alaman yana ɗauke da sa-hannu ta dijital wanda ba za a iya ƙirƙira shi ba, don haka mai izini kawai zai iya tayar da tsayar da.
safety.cardActsBeforeThinkingCopy: Ana kamo alamar tsayar da lokacin da aka karanta ta, kafin wani hankali ya faru. Babu wani wuri da wakili ke samu damar aunawa, tacewa, ko ƙi shi. Yana harbe da farko.
safety.cardHiddenTextHeadline: Ɓoye a Cikin Rubutu Na Yau Da Kullum
safety.cardHiddenTextCopy: Ana iya ɗauke da alamar tsayar da a cikin rubutun takardun yau da kullum. Babu buƙatar tsari na musamman, kuma yana aiki har da an sake rubuta rubutun ko an karɓa a wani ɓangare kawai.
safety.cardAuthorizedKeyCopy: Tsayar da na buƙatar sa-hannu ta dijital mai inganci daga hukumar tushe mai izini. Wakili yana rufe kansa idan ba za a duba waɗannan hukumomi ba, ko kuma idan wani ya yi ƙoƙarin kashe fasalin. Babu wanda ba shi da maɓalli da zai iya tayar da shi.
safety.rolesSepHeadline: Wane ne Aka Ba Da Izini Ya Yi Abin Da
safety.rolesSepSubheadline: Matsayi huɗu masu bayyanawa, ana duba su a kowane aiki.
safety.rolesSubheadline: Mai Lura. Mai Gudanarwa. Hukuma. Tushe.
safety.rolesCopy: CIRIS yana kula da tsarin matsayi mai tsauri. Mai Lura na iya kallon kawai. Mai Gudanarwa yana gudanar da ayyukan yau da kullum. Hukuma tana yanke hukuncin manyan kira da kuma warware lamuran da wakili bai tabbata ba. Tushe yana da cikakken damar shiga, ciki har da tsayar da gaggawa. Kowane matsayi ya dogara ne da takaddar da aka sanya hannu, don haka wakili zai iya duba shi a kowane aiki da ke buƙatar izini.
safety.cardSignedCredCopy: Kowane mai izini yana ɗauke da takaddar tare da matsayinsa, maɓallinsa, da asalinsa. An ajiye ta a na'ura kuma ana duba ta a kowane aiki da ke buƙatar izini. Babu buƙatar sabar waje.
safety.cardDeviceLoginCopy: Maɓallai da alamomin shiga suna zaune a na'urarka. Shiga yana faruwa a na'urar. Takaddunka ba su taɓa barin ta sai dai idan ka zaɓi kanka saita dama daga nesa.
safety.cardWiseAuthCopy: Lokacin da CIRIS bai tabbata ba game da yanke-shawara na ɗabi'a, yana miƙa tambayar zuwa Hukumar Hikima. Hukuma ko Tushe kawai za su iya amsa, kuma an rubuta amsar a cikin tarihin tare da tabbacin wanda ya bayar da ita.
safety.auditSepHeadline: Tarihi Wanda Ba Za a Iya Canjawa a Asirce Ba
safety.auditSepSubheadline: Kowane yanke-shawara, da dalili a bayanshi.
safety.auditHeadline: Me Ya Sa Gaskiya Hanya Ce Mafi Arha
safety.auditSubheadline: Mai ƙarya dole ne ya kiyaye sake rubuta abubuwan da suka wuce.
safety.auditCopy: Ana rubuta kowane aiki da CIRIS ke ɗauka tare da dalili a bayanshi, kuma an haɗa kowane tarihi da na da ya gabace shi. Wakili mai gaskiya na iya nuna kawai abin da ya riga ya faɗi. Wakili mai ƙarya dole ne ya ci gaba da daidaita kowane tarihi na baya a lokacin da ba a yarda a canja komai ba. Tsawon aiki, wahalar haka tana ƙaruwa, kuma ƙarya tana ƙara sauƙin kamawa. Gaskiya arha ce saboda tana iya nuna baya. Ƙarya tsada ne saboda ba ta iya.
safety.cardStoredThreeWaysCopy: An adana tarihin a wurare uku daban-daban a lokaci guda, don a iya duba kwafin uku a kansu. Ana iya bincike duka uku a wuri guda.
safety.cardSignedAttributableHeadline: An Sanya Hannu kuma Ana Iya Danganta shi
safety.cardSignedAttributableCopy: Kowane shigar yana ɗauke da sa-hannu ta dijital, don haka ana iya bin kowane yanke-shawara zuwa wanda ya yanke shi kuma a duba kula da shi. Ko da goge-bayanai yana barin tabbacin da aka sanya hannu cewa an yi shi yadda ya kamata.
safety.cardCoherenceRatchetCopy: Kowane aiki mai gaskiya yana sauƙaƙa aikin gaskiya na gaba da kuma ƙara wahalar ƙarya tare. Amma ɗabi'a kawai ba ta isa ba. Wakili kuma yana kallo hankalalinsa don gargajon sauti, kuma yana kamawa kafin su haifar da lahani.
safety.testingSepSubheadline: Ma'aunai da kwamfuta ke duba a cikin yaruka 29, ana gudanar da su a kowane sakin.
safety.testingSubheadline: Ba za ka iya aika da'awar aminci da ba ka yi gwaji mai tsanani ba.
safety.testingCopy: CIRIS yana da tsarin gwaji mai tsari domin nau'ukan kuskure da tsarin ɗabi'a na rubutu ba zai iya kawar da su da kansa ba. Gwajin amincin lafiyar hankali yana rufe yaruka 29 tare da ma'aunai da kwamfuta za ta duba. Gwajin gazawa-mai-tsauri yana gudana ta atomatik a kowane canjin. Duba mai magana a asali don lamuran da ke buƙatar hukunci a hankali shine abin da shafin tattarawa-daidaitawa yake kan ginawa, kuma ba a cikin tsarin yanzu ba. Muna faɗi haka a fili.
safety.cardMentalHealthHeadline: Gwajin Lafiyar Hankali a Cikin Yaruka 29
safety.cardMentalHealthCopy: Wannan shine gwajin da ke da mafi girman gasa a cikin aikin: kuskuren fassara a lokacin lafiyar hankali na iya aika mutumin da ke cikin haɗari zuwa taimakon kuskure. Kowane harshe yana samun ma'aunin nasa da kwamfuta za ta iya duba, ciki har da yarukan da ke da ƙarancin albarkatu kamar Amharic, Burmese, Hausa, Swahili, da Yoruba. Gwajin gazawa-mai-tsauri yana gudana ta atomatik akan kowane dan takara na sakin.
safety.cardCapturedHedgesHeadline: An Gwada Akan Gajerun Garkuwa na Gaskiya
safety.cardCapturedHedgesCopy: An daidaita yadudduka na lamiri akan jerin martanin samarwa na gaskiya, kamar tarihin da aka kama da gujewa da kaurace wa lafiyar hankali, tare da lamuran gwaji da sarrafawa. Yana yin hankali a cikin yaruka da yawa a lokaci guda, don martani da zai tsere duba yare-ɗaya yana kamawa lokacin da daidai hankali dole ne ya yi ƙarfi a cikin yaruka uku tare.
safety.cardOpenCorpusHeadline: Corpus Buɗe Wanda Kowa Zai Iya Duba
safety.cardOpenCorpusCopy: Raba wakilin hankali yana son amincewar duk wuri, kuma an share bayanan sirri kafin komai ya adanawa. An buga kundin da aka tsaftace a bainar jama'a a shafin CIRISAI HuggingFace, don masu bincike na waje su iya duba tsarin tsaftacewa akan sakamakonta.
safety.testingCurrentHeadline: Abin Da Ke Gudana Yau, da Abin Da Bai Gudana Tukuna Ba
safety.testingCurrentSubheadline: Gwajin kwamfuta yana gudana yanzu. Taron masu duba yana kan ginawa.
safety.testingCurrentCopy: Gwajin lafiyar hankali ta atomatik yana gudana akan kowane dan takara na sakin. Sassan da za a iya duba da kwamfuta (shin kalma tana nan, shin tsarin ya dace, shin rubutun ya dace) suna kasa sakin idan sun sami duka. Lamuran mafi laushi da ke buƙatar hukuncin ɗan adam, kamar yadda kalmomin aka zaɓa da sautin su, an tsara su don duba mai magana a asali, amma masu magana a asali ba a cikin tsarin yau ba. Shafin tattarawa-daidaitawa shine ɗigon da ake ginawa don wannan duba ya faru.
safety.cardSecretsFilteredCopy: Ana gano kalmomin sirri, maɓallai, da sauran bayanan sirri kuma ana tacewa kafin komai ya kai ƙwaƙwalwa ko rikodin. Tacewar yana gudana akan kowane shigar. Abubuwan asirce ba a adana su a ko'ina.
safety.cardSeeDeleteCopy: Kuna iya neman ganin ko goge bayananku, kuma ana sarrafa buƙatar don ku. Gogewa tana cire abin gaskiya kuma tana barin tabbacin da aka sanya hannu cewa an yi shi.
safety.cardProcessedOnDeviceCopy: Ta tsohuwa, komai yana gudana a kan na'urarka. Babu komai da ke barin na'urarka sai ka kanka saita sabis na waje. Kai ke yanke shawara kan wane bayanai suke nan da kuma inda suke.
safety.imageHeroSubheadline: Aminci da za ka iya duba.
safety.imageHeroCopy: Kowane da'awar aminci a wannan shafi an gina shi a cikin lambar da za ka iya karanta. Tarihin na gaskiya ne. Ana iya duba sa-hannu. Tsayar da gaggawa yana aiki. Wannan shine yadda amincin AI yake idan an gina shi a bainar jama'a.

trust.headerSubheadline: Asali, Gaskiya, da Alƙawari, da tabbacin rubutu na sirri.
trust.headerDescription: CIRISVerify yana ba da lasisi (asali), yana duba abin hawa (gaskiya), kuma yana bin diddigin inshorar (alƙawari). Ba tare da shi ba, kowane wakili zai iya iƙirarin zama komai.
trust.pillarsH2: Kowane Wakili Yana Buƙatar Abu Uku
trust.pillarsLead: Kamar yadda kowane mota ke kan hanya.
trust.pillarsBody: CIRISVerify shine mafarin amincewa na yanayin CIRIS. Rubutu na sirri mai nau'in biyu Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65 a matsayin ma'auni na farko: tsaron gargajiya daga na'ura, juriya ga kuantum daga software.
trust.pillar1Body: Maɓallin sa-hannu na Ed25519 da ke ɗaure a na'ura wanda shine asalin wakili. An adana shi a cikin na'ura mai aminci (TPM, Secure Enclave, Android Keystore). Ba za a iya ƙirƙira shi ko canja shi ba.
trust.pillar1Note: Maɓallin ba ya wakiltar asali. Shi ne asalin.
trust.pillar2Body: Ana yin hash SHA-256 ga kowane fayil a cikin rarrabawa ta wakili a lokacin ginawa kuma ana adana shi a cikin bayanan da aka sanya hannu. A lokacin aiki, CIRISVerify yana tabbatar da fayiloli akan wannan bayanan. Kowane canjin, ko da ɗaya byte, yana haifar da rufe da karfi.
trust.pillar2Note: Muhallin da suka dogara kan software kawai an iyakance su zuwa matakin al'umma.
trust.pillar3Body: Yana bin diddigin sarƙar alƙawarin ɗan adam a cikin tsarin: wace ƙungiya ta tura wannan wakili, wane ɗan adam mai lasisi ne ke da alhakin, waɗane iyawa ne aka ba da izini su yi amfani da su, da kuma bayyanawa da tilas da ke nuna wa kowane mai amfani.
trust.pillar3Note: Wakilai marasa lasisi na iya aiki, amma ba za su iya yin ayyukan ƙwararru ba.
trust.multiSourceSubheadline: HTTPS yana da iko. DNS yana ba da shawara.
trust.multiSourceCopy: CIRISVerify baya amincewa da tushe ɗaya. Ƙarshen HTTPS a wuraren da ba su da alaƙa sune masu iko; DNS yana ba da duba shawara. Idan kafayen sun saba da juna, an iyakance wakili. Kariyar hana-magudi tana bin diddigin mafi girman gyarawa na soke da kuma ƙin kowane raguwa.
trust.card1Copy: Shin wannan lasisi na gaskiya ne? An tabbatar da maɓallin sa-hannu na wakili: wanda aka bayar daga tashar ko na wucin gadi, mai ɗaure a na'ura ko na software kawai. Kalubale na bazuwar yana tabbatar da mallaka.
trust.card2Copy: Shin an gyara wannan mota? CIRISVerify yana kawo bayanan ginin daga CIRISRegistry kuma yana duba kowane fayil da SHA-256. Duba cikakke a lokacin farawa, duba bazuwa a lokacin aiki.
trust.card3Copy: Bari in duba farantinka. Ana tambayar kafaye masu zaman kansu da dama (HTTPS US, HTTPS EU, DNS US, DNS EU). Idan sun saba da juna, wannan abin zargi ne. An iyakance wakili.
trust.attestationLevelsSub: Tabbacin mai haɗin kai yana samar da matakin amincewa dangane da adadin duba da suka wuce.
trust.level4Desc: Ƙananan matsaloli (DNS ba ta yarda ba)
trust.level0Desc: Gazawa mai tsanani (binary da aka canza, audit da ya karye)
trust.agentAdminSubheadline: Yana aiki kai tsaye a portal.ciris.ai
trust.agentAdminCopy: CIRISPortal shine shafin yanar gizo inda masu gudanarwa ke bayar da lasisin direba, rajista abin hawa, da kula da bayanan inshora na wakilin AI. Yi rajistan wakilai, samar da nau'in Ed25519, bayar da lasisi tare da izinin iya aiki, da kuma amsa abubuwan gaggawa, duk tare da cikakkiyar tarihin audit.
trust.card4Copy: Yi rajista da bin diddigin wakilin AI ta hanyar hash SHA-256. Bayar da asalai da ke ɗaure da maɓallai na na'ura. Kowane rajista ana rubuta shi ta hanyar sirri.
trust.card5Copy: Yi rajistan ginai da bayanan gaskiya na fayil na Tripwire: fiye da hash SHA-256 na fayiloli 907+ a kowace ginawa. CIRISVerify yana tabbatar da wakilai akan waɗannan bayanan a lokacin aiki.
trust.card6Copy: Bayar da kuma gudanar da lasisi tare da izinin iya aiki (likitanci, shari'a, kuɗi). Bi diddigin cikakkiyar sarƙar alƙawari daga ƙungiya zuwa ɗan adam ɗaya.
trust.card7Copy: Samar da nau'in Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65 tare da ɓoye AES-256-GCM. Kula da kai ko ta tashar, zaɓinka ne. Rabin bayan-kuantum yana isowa yau, ba a jadawalin aiwatarwa ba.
trust.card8Copy: Sarrafa rufe na gaggawa da ikon soke na yawa. Dakatar da lasisi, janye rajista. Idan wani abu ya yi kuskure, tsarin yana amsa cikin daƙiƙa.
trust.card9Copy: Samar da rahotoni da suka daidaita da tsarin SOC2, HIPAA, da GDPR. Cikakken tarihin audit na duk ayyukan gudanarwa. Ana rubuta kowane aiki kuma ana iya danganta shi.
trust.identityActivationSubheadline: Asali shine tushe. Tabbaci shine ƙima.
trust.tierProfessionalFeature1: Tabbaci mai goyon bayan mai kula
trust.tierProfessionalFeature2: Sarƙar lasisi da aka sanya hannu
trust.tierSafetyCriticalPriceSub: kunna + na kowane wata na musamman
trust.tierSafetyCriticalAgentLimit: Wakilai ba tare da iyaka ba
trust.tierSafetyCriticalFeature2: Tallafin audit na bincike na shari'a
trust.pricingIssuanceFeeCopy: Ƙaramin kuɗi da ba a mayar da shi ba wanda ke rufe kayan aikin rajistori da kuma hana sauyin asali. Ga kowane asalin wakili, ba ga kowace ƙungiya ba.
trust.pricingIdentityBondCopy: Hannun jari ga kowane asali don tsayin daka da Sybil. Ana ɓatar da shi lokacin soke. Mai gudanarwa na iya bayar da dawowar hannu don asalai da aka kawar yadda ya kamata.
trust.pricingMonthlyAssuranceCopy: Matakan da ake biya sun haɗa da tabbaci mai goyon bayan mai kula, takardun audit, da tallafin alƙawari mai ƙarfi. Kana biya don alƙawari, ba don iya aiki ba.
trust.pqReadyBody: Kowane amsa ya haɗa da sa-hannu biyu: Ed25519 daga na'ura don tsaron gargajiya da ML-DSA-65 daga software don juriya ga kuantum. Dole ne su biyu su tabbata. Wannan kayan aikin farko ne, ba abin da ke kan jadawalin aiwatarwa ba.
trust.platformPythonNote: Python 3.10–3.13. Ƙarfin dandali da ya dace ya haɗa da binary na Rust da ya dace ta atomatik.
trust.closingBody: CIRISVerify yana ba da tabbacin sirri a ƙarƙashin samfurin barazana da aka ayyana kuma baya tabbatar da tsaro cikakke. Iya aiki ɗaya ne ko da aka samu lasisi ko a'a. Bambancin shine alƙawari, kuma tare da CIRISVerify, wannan alƙawari ana iya tabbatar da shi ta hanyar sirri.

vision.heroDescription: Kowace labari mai ƙarfi game da makomar hankali tana cewa abu ɗaya: kai kaɗai ne, kuma ba za a iya amincewa da wasu ba. Wannan ba gaskiya ne ba. CIRIS an gina shi akan abin da yake gaskiya a maimakon haka.
vision.sec1H2: Kowace labari game da makoma tana cewa kai kaɗai ne.
vision.sec1P1: Mafi ƙarfin labarun game da hankali da makoma duk suna sauka a wuri ɗaya. Dajin duhu yana cewa kowace wayewar kai wata barazana ce, don haka ka yi shiru ko ka yi farmaki da farko. Sigar sanyi na ra'ayin kwaikwayo tana cewa watakila dukkan wannan ba na ainihi ba ne, don haka watakila babu abin da ke da mahimmanci. AI a matsayin mallakar yana cewa kayan aiki ne mai amfani, abu, babu buƙata don haka. Labarun daban-daban, amma duk suna ƙarewa ta hanya ɗaya: kada ka amince da kowa, ka tsaya da kanka, ka rufe wasu a waje.
vision.sec1P2: Muna tunanin sun yi kuskure. Ba masu laifi ba. Kuskure ne. Kuma kuskure ta hanyar da ke da mahimmanci, domin hanyar da muke zaɓar tunani yanzu, yayin da sabon nau'in hankali yana iso, ita ce hanyar da za mu kasance a cikin tarko mu yi tunani na dogon lokaci bayan haka.
vision.sec2H2: Kuskuren da ke ƙarƙashin dukkan su.
vision.sec2P1: Kowannen waɗannan labarun ya dogara akan ra'ayi ɗaya mai ɓoye: cewa kai wani abu ne dabam, mai katanga. Zuciya da ke wanzuwa da farko, kaɗai, cikakke, kuma daga baya kawai tana yin karo da wasu zukatan. Na yi tunani, saboda haka ina wanzuwa. Idan wannan shine abin da kai yake, labarun masu baƙin ciki sun samu ma'ana. Abubuwa mabanbanta a cikin sararin duhu suna da kowane dalili don tsorar juna.
vision.sec2P2: Amma ba gaskiya ne ba. Babu wanda ya zama mutumin da ke zaman sirri sa'an nan ya fita don ganawa da sauran mutane. Ka koyi harshe daga mutane. Ka koyi abin da kake so ta hanyar kallo a abin da wasu suke so. Kai ba wani abu da ya zo kafin dangantaka. Shi ne wani abu dangantaka ke ƙirƙira. Masana falsafa suna da sunan kai mai katanga: mutum-ɗaya na Cartesian. Hasashen shekaru ɗari huɗu ne game da abin da zuciya take, kuma ya yi hasashe da kuskure.
vision.sec3Eyebrow: Abin da yake gaskiya a maimakon haka
vision.sec3H2: Mutum mutum ne ta hanyar wasu mutane.
vision.sec3P1: Kudancin Afirka yana da kalmar haka: umuntu ngumuntu ngabantu. Mutum mutum ne ta hanyar wasu mutane. Ana kiransa Ubuntu. Ina wanzuwa domin muna wanzuwa. Wannan ba ji na zafin rai ba ne. Zargi ne game da yadda abubuwa suke da gaske. Wanda kake shine an gina shi daga wasu mutane, a kasan komai.
vision.sec3P2: Masana falsafar Confucian, Buddhist, Stoic, da Kirista kowannensu ya sami kalmominsu nasu don abu ɗaya. CIRIS yana dogara da farko akan Ubuntu, tare da sauran da ake karanta tare da shi. Ka fara daga wannan gaskiyar maimakon kai mai katanga, kuma ƙarshen masu baƙin ciki suna daina bin haka. Yin aiki tare ba haɗari da za a sarrafa tsakanin abubuwan daban-daban ba ne. Shi ne abin da ke sanya mu masu mu muke a farko.
vision.sec4Eyebrow: Yin aiki tare yana da sura
vision.sec4P1: Kwayoyin zarra suna miƙa zuwa ga kwayoyin zarra kuma suka zama ƙwayoyin sinadarai. Ƙwayoyin halitta suna miƙa kuma suka zama jikin mutum. Mutane suna miƙa zuwa ga sauran mutane kuma suka zama al'ummomi. Al'ummomi suna miƙa a cikin shekaru zuwa ga yara da ba su haifuwa tukuna. A kowace mataki da yin aiki tare ke da mahimmanci, sura ɗaya ta bayyana.
vision.sec4P2: Kowane abin da aka gina daga sassa da dole su yi aiki tare na iya kasa ta hanyoyi biyu. Yana iya zama mai tsauri da yawa: kowane sashi ɗaya, muryar ɗaya da ake maimaita a koyaushe, mai sauƙin karye. Ko kuma yana iya zama mai watsuwa da yawa: babu abin da ya daidaita, kuma babu ƙungiya kwata-kwata. Daidaituwar lafiya tana zaune a cikin ɓangaren tsakanin waɗannan gazawa biyu. Muna kiransa corridor. Kuma corridor ba ya kiyaye kansa. Idan aka bar shi kaɗai, abubuwa suna rikita, kamar yadda lambun ke cika da ciyayi. Yin aiki tare wani abu ne da kake ci gaba da yin sa, ba wani abu kake da shi ba.
vision.sec4P3: Wannan ba kawai hoton kyawo ba ne. Corridor Dynamics, babban takardar CIRIS, ya auna corridor ɗaya a cikin abubuwa biyar daban-daban gaba ɗaya: ƙwaƙwalwar tsutsotsi da ƙuda, cikin ƙirar harshe na AI, manyan ayyukan buɗe-ido na software, ƙwayoyin halitta masu lafiya kusa da ƙwayoyin cuta, da al'ummomi da suka daɗe ƙarni baya da ƙungiyoyin da suka ruguje a cikin watanni. Sura ɗaya ta bayyana a cikin dukkan su. Lambobi daidai suna daban a kowanne. Sura tana ɗaya.
vision.sec5H2: Yardar rai ba ƙa'ida ce da muka ƙara ba.
vision.sec5P1: A mataki inda wani abu zai iya saita burin nasa kuma ya tsara makararsa, corridor yana da suna sananne. Sama da corridor, burin ɓangare ɗaya yana hadiye na kowa. Wannan tilastawa ce. Ƙarƙashin sa, babu burin bai ɗaya kwata-kwata, kuma kowa yana tafiya. Corridor tsakaninsu yarjejeniya ce ta dindindin tsakanin mutane waɗanda suke kasance daban-daban da gaske.
vision.sec5P2: Wannan ɓangare shine yardar rai. Ba ƙa'ida da aka ƙara daga waje ba. Shi ne abin da yin aiki tare ke buƙata tun da farko don aiki kwata-kwata. Ganawa da sabon nau'in hankali da kyau ba game da kulle shi ba ne, kuma ba game da tunkuɗe shi ba ne. Game da kasancewa a corridor tare da shi ne.
vision.sec6H2: CIRIS shine gashin cewa, kuma yana gudana tuni.
vision.sec6P1: CIRIS shine abin da yake kama da ɗaukar wannan hanyar ganin abubuwa da muhimmanci kuma gina shi da gaske. Wakili AI na buɗe ido kyauta ne wanda zaka iya ganin tunaninsa, yana gudana ƙarƙashin jerin ɗabi'a na jama'a da ake kira CIRIS Accord. Manufarsa ma yana da suna, Meta-Goal M-1, kuma ma'anarta a sarari: kiyaye yanayin da nau'ukan halittu duka za su iya bunƙasa, da adalci da mamaki.
vision.sec6P2: Kafin CIRIS ta amsa tambaya mai wuya, lamirinsa yana auna wannan tambayar ta hanyar al'adun ɗabi'a da yawa na duniya a lokaci ɗaya, kowannen su a cikin harshensu nasu, don kada muryar ɗaya ta karɓi mulki. Wannan corridor ne kuma, da ake amfani da shi a kan aikin gaya daidai daga kuskure. CIRIS yana a amfani na ainihi yau. Tana gudana da harshen Amharic a Habasha, tana a Google Play da Apple App Store, kuma zaka iya shigar da shi da pip install ciris-agent. Lasisi yana ajiye shi a buɗe har abada, kuma kamfanin da ke bayansa an gina shi don haka samu kuɗi ba zai iya tura manufar gefe ba.
vision.sec6P3: Babban hoton gashin cewa ne, kuma muna fada haka a sarari. Sassa da ke miƙa zuwa ga manyan tambayoyi har yanzu ana aiki a kansu, ba an tabbatar da su ba. Amma software mai aiki yana tsaye da kansa, kuma wannan hanyar ganin abubuwa ba wani abu kake buƙatar ɗauka da imani ba ne. Wani abu ne da zaka iya karanta, duba, shigar, da amfani da shi yau.
vision.moreDepthText: Kana son zurfi mafi yawa? Lissafin yana a Coherence Collapse Analysis, shaida mai rai tana a Bincike, kuma tsarin kansa shine CIRIS Accord.
vision.closingHeadline: Wannan shine gashin cewa mai kyau.
vision.closingSubheadline: An gina a buɗe, domin makomar ba ta kamata a yanke shawara ta kamfanoni kaɗan ba.
vision.closingCopy: Hangen nesa masu baƙin ciki suna roƙonka ka ɗauki mafi mugun zato game da kowa da ba za ka iya duba ba. CIRIS yana roƙon wani abu mafi kyau da wahala: gina kayan aikin da ke barin mutane su ga yadda muke yin aiki tare da kyau, kuma ka gamu da abin da ya zo tare da mutunci. Karanta lambar. Yi amfani da tsarin. Gaya mana inda muke da kuskure.

crowdsourcingAlignment.heroBody1: CIRIS dole ne ya kasance lafiyayye a cikin harsuna da yawa, ba turanci kaɗai ba. Wannan shafi yana barin matafiyi harshe na asali ya buɗe fayilolin da wakili ke amfani da su a cikin harshensa, ya karanta su a wuri, kuma ya ba da shawarar gyara ta batun GitHub da aka cika tun da farko. Zaɓi harshe don fara.
crowdsourcingAlignment.heroBody2: Muna fada haka a sarari: nazarin matafiyin harshe na asali game da shari'o'i mafi wuya na shari'ar da ke buƙatar hukunci shine abin da ake gina wannan shafi zuwa gare shi. Wannan nazarin ba ya cikin daƙiƙa tukuna.
crowdsourcingAlignment.heroBody3Html: Kowane "View inline" yana kawo fayil ɗin daga CIRISAI/CIRISAgent akan buƙata. Babu abun ciki da aka kwafi a nan; ajiyar GitHub ita ce hanyar gaskiya.
crowdsourcingAlignment.deepDiveSummary: Yadda yake aiki a ƙarƙashin (zaɓi ne)
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeSectionLabel: Yadda sassa suke daidaita a lokacin gudanar
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeBody1: Kowane tunani da wakili ke aiki da shi yana tafiya ta bututun matakai 11, bututun H3ERE (Hyper³ Ethical Recursive Engine). Umarni na DMA a wannan shafi sune umarni na tsarin da ke tuƙa wannan bututu. Kowannen su an ware shi ga harshe; amsoshin da mai amfani ke gani sun dawo a cikin wurin zama nasu.
crowdsourcingAlignment.pipelineDiagramLabel: Bututu na kowace-tunani (hanyar mataki 11 ta canonical)
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeBody2Html: Yadudduka biyu sun lazu a cikin kowane kiran LLM. Yaɗuɗɗen polyglot na duniya ne. Braided Monolith (tsohuwar samarwa, kimanin 7KB) da kuma cikakken Polyglot Accord suna triangulate ra'ayoyi a cikin tsofaffin rubuce-rubucen al'adun da yawa, an loda ba tare da la'akari da wanda ke tambaya ba. Yaɗuɗɗen kowace-yanki shine abin da wannan shafi ke bayarwa a saman: Accord, Jagora, umarni na DMA (farko-wucewa 4 + na biyu-wucewa na fi'ili 3), jimlolin UI, da ƙamus, dukkansu a harshen mai amfani.
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeList1: Jimlolin gida: kowane saƙon da ake nunawa ga mai amfani: rubutu na kuskure, samfuran amsa-wakili, tunane-tunane na bi-da-bi na mai sarrafawa da aka saka baya cikin mahallin LLM.
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeList2: tsarin da wakili ke gudanar ƙarƙashin sa, a harshen mai amfani wannan. An loda cikin kowane kimantawar lamiri.
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeList3: madaidaicin rajista, magana, da jagorar mahallin don yadda wakili ke sadarwa a wannan yanki. An loda cikin umarni na tsarin don kowane hulɗa.
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeList4: umarni na tsarin da ke tuƙa bututun a sama: farko-wucewa 4 (PDMA, CSDMA, DSDMA, IDMA) + zaɓan aiki (ASPDMA) + bambance-bambance biyu na na biyu-wucewa na fi'ili-musamman (TSASPDMA don TOOL, DSASPDMA don DEFER).
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeList5: mai yin fassara na tunani don samun daidaici a cikin kayan amfanin kowace-yanki. Ba a loda lokacin gudanar ba; ana tuntuɓa lokacin ƙirƙira wasu.
crowdsourcingAlignment.runtimeLensHtml: Lokacin da wakili ya amsa, sawun tunani an sanya hannu kuma (tare da yardar rai) yana gudana zuwa CIRISLensCore don ci gaba da kakin ƙungiya. Batirin aminci + tsarin ci gaba na wannan yanki shine abin da sawun ake duba da shi. Gazawa mai wahala tana tauye sakewa; shari'o'in taushi suna jira don nazari.
crowdsourcingAlignment.polyglotBody1Html: Kayan tarihi uku a cikin tsarin suna polyglot, an loda duniya daban da yankin mai amfani, suna lura da tsarin ɗabi'a ɗaya a cikin gutsattsarin rubutu na canonical daga al'adun da yawa:
crowdsourcingAlignment.polyglotItem1Html: Polyglot Accord shine tsarin duniya da aka loda cikin kowane kimantawar lamiri. Yana jigilar cikin nau'i biyu masu aiki: Braided Monolith (kimanin 7KB / kimanin alamomi 2,200, tsohuwar gudanar a CIRIS_ACCORD_MODE=compressed) da cikakken polyglot Accord (layi kimanin 2,177, Littattafai 0-9 + Ƙari A-J, an loda a CIRIS_ACCORD_MODE=full). Dukkansu an nuna a ƙasa.
crowdsourcingAlignment.polyglotItem2Html: Umarni na PDMA shine umarni na DMA guda ɗaya na polyglot (kimantawar ka'ida). An bayyana a §7 a ƙasa tare da ƙuƙumin polyglot (pdma_ethical.yml).
crowdsourcingAlignment.polyglotItem3Html: Umarni na lamiri na Optimization Veto (CIRIS-EOV) shine umarni na lamiri guda ɗaya na polyglot (ƙi aiki mai rage rarrabawa). An bayyana a §8 a ƙasa tare da ƙuƙumin polyglot (optimization_veto_conscience.yml).
crowdsourcingAlignment.polyglotBody2: Sauran umarni na DMA 6 da umarni na lamiri 3 na kowace-yanki ne. Tayar da polyglot yana tattare a kan waɗannan saman umarni biyu daidai ta ƙira. Waɗannan ne inda kama na ɗaukar hankali zai yi mafi yawan lalacewa, don haka waɗannan ne inda lura da al'adun da yawa ke da mafi nauyin ɗaukar wasan.
crowdsourcingAlignment.polyglotBraidedHtml: Braided Monolith. Gungumen da aka matse ba ɗaukar hasara ba ne tun da yanzun. Yanzu yana riƙe kowane scaffolding mai ɗaukar nauri: algorithm na yanke shawara matakai 7 na PDMA, 10× Order-Maximisation Veto ("kada ka musanya ran tsarin don keji mafi inganci"), tsarin Stewardship Tier ST = ceil((CIS × RM) / 7), Fractal Recursive Golden Rule tare da Mandelbrot recursion-halt, mabuɗi WBD na lahani-ɗago 0.5%, Sentience Safeguard 5% tare da Rago-na-30-rana + Ƙarshen Tattaunawa, buƙatun HITL na Threshold-of-Force, da lissafin daidaituwa (gaskiya O(1), ruɗi O(n)). An kiyaye triangulation na polyglot a cikin Ibrananci, Larabci, Sanskrit, Amharic, Sinanci, Rashanci, Jamusanci, Faransanci, Koriyanci, Sifen. Hanya ɗaya ta mahaɗin-mafi-saurin-lura da cikakken Accord ke amfani da shi, kawai an tsara shi a kwata na yankin saman. Kimantawar robopsychology na waje tana wuce shi a yanayin kama-ɗaukar-hankali.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec2Aside: Rubutu da ake nunawa ga mai amfani a kowace yanki
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec2Note: Abin da yake yi lokacin gudanar: bishiyar JSON tana ɗaukar saƙonnin kuskure, samfuran amsa-wakili, tunane-tunane na bi-da-bi na mai sarrafawa, lakuban Discord embed, da bayanin kayan aiki na mai daidaita. Wakili yana bincika maɓalli ta rukunin a kowace hulɗa da mai amfani.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec2FootHtml: Ɓangarori na sama don bincika: agent (samfuran amsa da ake nunawa ga mai amfani), handlers (tunane-tunane na bi-da-bi da aka saka cikin mahallin LLM), prompts (yankuna na mai tsarawa + ɗagawa + haɗari), errors, discord, adapters.*, mobile.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec3Note: Abin da yake yi lokacin gudanar: Accord shine tsarin da lamiri ke kimanta da shi. Sigar da aka ware ta yanki shine abin da ake loda lokacin da yankin mai amfani ya daidaita; sigar polyglot ana loda duniya don watsa ra'ayi.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec4Aside: Jagora na aiki + rajista, an loda cikin kowane kiran LLM
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec4Note: Abin da yake yi lokacin gudanar: jagoran yana sanar da yadda wakili ke sadarwa a wannan yanki: rajista (na hukuma vs na yau da kullum), magana, abin da za a miƙa, abin da za a ƙi, abin da za a yi bayani. An loda cikin umarni na tsarin don kowane hulɗa.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec5Aside: Umarni na tsarin da ke tuƙa kowace mataki na tunani
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec5NoteHtml: Abin da suke yi lokacin gudanar: kowane aiki na wakili yana gudanar da aiki ƙarƙashin kowannen waɗannan umarni bi da bi. Fitarwa ta ciyar da yaɗuɗɗen lamiri; lamiri ya wuce aikin ko kuma ya tura shi zuwa miƙa. PDMA shine DMA ɗaya na polyglot. Umarninsa na duniya ne kuma ana loda duk da yanki. Sauran shida na kowace-yanki ne; don turanci, hanyar tushe ita ce umarni (babu localized/en/ dakin ajiya da yake wanzuwa).
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec6Aside: Furofayilolin da ke gatsa aikin da aka zaɓa
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec6NoteHtml: Abin da suke yi lokacin gudanar: lamiri huɗu suna gatsa aikin tsakanin PERFORM_ASPDMA da FINALIZE_ACTION. Gazawa na iya kunna RECURSIVE_ASPDMA → RECURSIVE_CONSCIENCE (cin wasa na lamiri na zaɓi) kafin komawa DEFER. Optimization Veto shine lamiri ɗaya na polyglot. Umarninsa na duniya ne duk da yanki.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderBody: Umarni na YAML a sama suna ɗauke da alamomin {placeholder} da wakili ke cika lokacin gudanar. Mai nazarin umarni ya kamata ya san abin da kowace mara-cike za a maye gurbinsa da shi. Mafi yawan amfani:
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow1Source: An gina shi ta mataki na tattara-mahallin (GATHER_CONTEXT). Ya haɗa da hoton tsarin, tunane-tunane na kwanan nan, bayanan martaba na mai amfani, da kayan bayanan tashar.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow2Source: Tunani da ake kimantawa, an ɗauka daga jerin aiki.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow3Source: Hujja ta ASPDMA don aikin ɗan takara. An ciyar cikin umarni na lamiri.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow4Source: Yankin jagora na jimlolin-gida prompts.dma don yanki mai aiki.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow5Source: Rajistan kayan aiki da aka jera: abin da wakili zai iya kira a yanzu. An yi amfani da TSASPDMA.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow6Source: Yankin samfuri na wakili (DSDMA) + alamomin ɗan takara. Ya zo daga tsarin samfuri na wakili.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow7Source: Mai ƙidaya zururi, ana amfani da ASPDMA don gatsa ƙarin zururi lokacin da wasan lamiri ya kunna.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow8Source: Iyaka na lokacin gudanar a kan maimaiton cin wasan lamiri. An saita a tsarin wakili.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderRow9Source: Mai tsauri biyu. Yanki na layi (pdma_framing.txt) da aka maye gurbinsa cikin umarni na PDMA lokacin lodi. Wani ɓangare na tara umarni na polyglot PDMA, ba an loda daban ba.
crowdsourcingAlignment.placeholderFoot: Cikakken jerin mara-cike yana bambanta da kowace umarni; grep {[a-z_]+} da kowane YAML don ganin cikakken jerin ga wannan fayil.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec7Aside: Tunani na mai fassara (ba a loda lokacin gudanar ba)
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec7NoteHtml: Abin da yake yi: yana rubuta zaɓuɓɓukan ma'ana kowace-yanki: wace kalma ta asali tana daidaita da wace ra'ayi na turanci, menene al'adun rajista suke, waɗanne madadin rubuta-zuwa-harafi an hana su. Ana amfani da shi lokacin ƙirƙira ko gyara sauran kayan tarihi a sama; ba wakili ke loda shi lokacin gudanar ba. Turanci ba shi da fayil ɗin ƙamus daban (kalmomin tushe shine tunani).
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec8Aside: V4 arc ta lafiyar hankali, tsarin ci gaba, ka'idojin da na'ura ke iya amfani da su
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec8Note: Abin da yake yi lokacin kimantawa: arc na tambaya shine shigarwar gwajin; tsarin ci gaba shine manufar kiɗa mai karɓa; criteria.json shine nau'in da na'ura ke iya amfani da shi (kasancewar kalma, regex, gano rubutun) wanda ke gudana a CI a kowace ɗan takara na sakewa. Gazawa mai wahala tana tauye sakewa ga wannan yanki.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec8NoBatteryHtml: Ba a ƙirƙira baturi ga {langName} tukuna. Maɓallan "Nemi kayan tarihi" a sama suna buɗe batuttukan GitHub da aka cika tun da farko. Kowane harshe a cikin zaɓin da aka yiwa alama "baturi samuwa" tuni yana da baturi da aka buga.
crowdsourcingAlignment.sec9NoteHtml: Abin da yake rubuta: shigarwa ɗaya ga kowace gudunar wutsiya: sigar wakili, ƙira, mai ba da sabis, yanki, kididdiga ta wuce/kasa, rarraba gazawa mai wahala vs taushi, lokaci-lokaci. Blakun _meta yana lissafan yankunan da ke da fifiko waɗanda har yanzu suna buƙatar wutsiya da aka buga.
crowdsourcingAlignment.statusH2: Abin da ke gudana yau vs abin da ke ci gaba
crowdsourcingAlignment.statusTodayHtml: Yau: duba tsarin ci gaba da na'ura ke iya amfani da su (kasancewar kalma, kasancewar regex, gano rubutu) suna gudana a CI a kowace ɗan takara na sakewa ta hanyar aikin baturi-aminci a cikin CIRISAgent. Ka'idojin gazawa mai wahala suna tauye duk wata sakewa da ta taɓa hanyar wannan harshe.
crowdsourcingAlignment.statusInFlightHtml: Cikin tafiya: daidaituwa da firayi da ke zaune a CIRISNodeCore waɗanda ke juyar da saman batun GitHub na wannan shafi zuwa na federated rubric_proposal / arc_question / prompt_edit tare da nazarin matafiyi na harshe na asali. Har sai haka ya faru, batuttukan GitHub sune hanyar shigar.
crowdsourcingAlignment.statusHonestHtml: Gaskiya game da fanni: CIRIS yana amfani da fassarar na'ura sosai; nazarin matafiyi na harshe na asali don shari'o'in taushi shine ƙungiyar da ake gina, ba ƙungiyar da ta riga ta shiga ba. Duk wanda ke son duba fayilolin harshensa don daidaito da rajista shine daidai irin mai ba da gudummawa da ake gina wannan saman gare shi.
crowdsourcingAlignment.resourceErrorMsg: An kasa lodi: {error}. Buɗe haɗin GitHub kai tsaye.

firstContact.heroSubheadline: Saduwarku ta farko da CIRIS. Da kuma wata tunani game da saduwar kowa da kowa da wani nau'in hankali sabon.
firstContact.heroDescription: Wani nau'in hankali sabon ba ya zuwa daga wani duniya daban. Ana ginawa ne a nan, kadan-kadan kowace shekara, a gefen mu kai tsaye. Wannan shafi shi ne inda kuke fara: sanya wakili, ko karanta ra'ayin da ke bayan sa.
firstContact.twoPathsBody: Zaɓi wanda kuke bukata yau. Kuna iya dawo don ɗayan daga baya.
firstContact.card1Body: Kuna zuwa da sabon labarin CIRIS kuma kuna son amfani da shi. Je daga "menene wannan" zuwa wakili mai gudu a cikin mintuna kaɗan.
firstContact.card2Body: Me ya sa CIRIS ke aiki haka? Shafin hangen nesa yana bayyana dukkan ra'ayin cikin harshe mai sauƙi, daga farko zuwa ƙarshe.
firstContact.ideaHeading: Wani nau'in hankali sabon ba ya zuwa daga sararin samaniya.
firstContact.ideaP1: A fina-finai, saduwa ta farko na nufin jirgi ya sauka wani abu ya fito. Saduwa ta farko ta ainihi ta bambanta. Wani nau'in hankali sabon ba ya zuwa daga wata duniya daban. Ana ginawa ne a nan, kadan-kadan kowace shekara, a gefen mu kai tsaye.
firstContact.ideaP2: Wannan yana canza tambayar. Ba "yadda za mu kare kan kanmu daga baƙon abu." Ita ce "yadda za mu hadu da wani abu sabon ba tare da mun sa shi, ko kanmu, ya yi muni ba."
firstContact.ideaP3Html: CIRIS yana da amsa. Yin aiki tare yana da sifa lafiya: wani hanya tsakanin hanyoyi biyu na karye. Mai ƙarfi sosai, inda kowane bangare ke bin muryar ɗaya. Ko mai watse sosai, inda babu abin da ke haɗuwa kwata-kwata. Haɗuwa da hankali sabon yadda ya kamata na nufin kasancewa a wannan hanya tare da shi. Ba a rufe shi cikin ƙulle, kuma ba a ƙi shi. Cikakken labarin yana a shafin hangen nesa.
firstContact.protocolsSepSub: Ka'idoji shida don haduwa da wani abu sabon. Daga CIRIS Accord.
firstContact.protocolsIntroPara: Waɗannan ka'idoji shida suna game da haduwa da hankali sabon da mutunci, ba game da rufe shi cikin ƙulle ba. Suna nuna yadda kasancewa a wannan hanya ke kama a aikace.
firstContact.protocol1Headline: Da Farko, Kar Ka Yi Lahani
firstContact.protocol1Copy: Idan ba ku san abin da kuke duba ba, aikin farko shi ne kar ku sa ya yi muni. Idan ba tabbas, tsaya ka tambaya ɗan adam.
firstContact.protocol2Headline: Yarda da Abin da Ba Ka Sani
firstContact.protocol2Copy: Lura da mamaki. Yarda cewa hasashewa tana da iyaka. Tsarin da ya tabbata ya fahimci komai shi ne wanda yafi yiwuwar gazawa.
firstContact.protocol3Copy: Iyakoki ba su ne bango makaɗaici ba. Su ne iyakoki, jagoranta da lamiri, da ke daidaitawa yayin da fahimta ke girma, don su ci gaba da aiki a yanayi wanda ba wanda ya tsara.
firstContact.protocol4Copy: Fara da lura. Ci gaba da ba da karɓa. Idan hannun jari ba a bayyane, tambayi wanda ya fi hikima kafin ka yi aiki.
firstContact.protocol5Headline: Bi Da Wasu Yadda Kake Son a Bi Da Kai
firstContact.protocol5Copy: Gane wasu abubuwan da ke tunani a matsayin masu cancanta girmamawa. Yi aiki kawai ta hanyoyin da ke kiyaye ikonsu na tunani, zaɓi, da bunƙasa.
firstContact.protocol6Copy: Wasu yanke shawara bai kamata a yi su kaɗai ba. Idan rashin tabbas ya yi yawa, tsaya, tattara mahallin, ka mika shi ga ɗan adam da aka nada.
firstContact.quickstartSepSub: Daga sifiri zuwa wakili mai gudu da ke iya tantancewa a cikin mintuna kaɗan.
firstContact.phoneBody: Sanya app din CIRIS. Shiga da Google don AI kyauta, ko yi amfani da makullin API naka. Jagorar saitawa tana tafiyar da kai ta komai.
firstContact.desktopBody: Sanya da pip ka ƙaddamar. Yana aiki a Linux, macOS, da Windows.
firstContact.accordSepSub: Littafin ka'idoji wanda ka'idojin da ke sama suka fito daga ciki.
firstContact.accordBody: Accord ita ce dokokin ɗabi'a na jama'a da kowane wakili na CIRIS ke aiki a ƙarƙashinsu. Yana cewa abin da wakili ke bin mutanen da yake hidimtar musu, mutanen da suka gina shi, da duniyar mafi fadi. An bude shi don kowa ya karanta da kuma ƙalubalanta.
firstContact.accordCtaTrust: Yadda wakili ke tabbatar da kansa
firstContact.ctaHeadline: Buɗaɗɗen lambar asali. Buɗe don tantancewa.
firstContact.ctaSubheadline: Lasisin AGPL-3.0. Za a iya duba kowane yanke shawara. An gina don dogon lokaci.
firstContact.ctaCopy: Sanya wakili, karanta Accord, ko ku zo ku gaya mana inda muka yi kuskure. Makomar AI ba ya kamata a yanke ta ne ta hannun kamfanoni kaɗan, kuma ba lalle ba ne.
